textByHash.12d494b13c3a56f9d3f889951a347edb0e29fd30: Of course I can tell you that I haven't drunk the contents...
textByHash.342e976060d2d23f841e217271bfab9528c3059c: I suppose I'd better get going. I'll meet you at the Dancing Donkey Inn.
textByHash.6e8a53b1c09b14d0e637e6b5372cd7031d56b4b8: Don't worry, I'm a pretty resourceful fellow you know.
textByHash.85a659e4c924cca5bfd5dbd945d99359b0551dc8: Oh the gods no! What do you take me for?
textByHash.9473618e708d29b9b4525120e59c83d2237c952d: But I'd be lying. Sorry about that me old mucker, can I get you a drink?
textByHash.fea79e2072caf762b3e14e182c47a10b8e5c8a41: Sure, I'm a regular at the Dancing Donkey Inn as it happens.
